name: std-agent-tutor
description: Agent tutor: personalized tutoring with quizzes, concepts, and student assessments.

schema.name: std-agent-tutor
schema.description: Agent tutor: personalized tutoring with quizzes, concepts, and student assessments.

fields.name: topic
fields.description: The subject or area of study being addressed.

fields.name: studentLevel
fields.description: Represents the student's proficiency level.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: Detailed clarification or reasoning for a concept or answer.

fields.name: questionsAsked
fields.description: The total number of questions presented during the session.

fields.name: correctAnswers
fields.description: The number of questions answered correctly.

fields.name: sessionStatus
fields.description: The current state of the tutoring session.

fields.name: error
fields.description: A textual description of any encountered problem.

fields.name: activeTab
fields.description: The currently selected tab or view within the session.

fields.name: items
fields.description: A list of items associated with the session.

emits.description: Fired when TutorSession finishes loading
Fired when TutorSession fails to load

children.content: What topic would you like to learn about? The tutor will assess your level and guide you through it.
Recalling prior learning and classifying skill level
What topic would you like to learn about? The tutor will assess your level and guide you through it.

fields.name: question
fields.description: The text of a question presented to the student.

fields.name: options
fields.description: A string representing available choices or settings.

fields.name: correctAnswer
fields.description: The correct answer to a question.

fields.name: studentAnswer
fields.description: The student's response to a question or prompt.

fields.name: isCorrect
fields.description: Indicates whether an answer is correct.

fields.name: feedback
fields.description: Textual comments or evaluations provided during the session.

fields.name: quizStatus
fields.description: Indicates the current state of a quiz.

emits.description: Fired when QuizQuestion finishes loading
Fired when QuizQuestion fails to load

children.content: Waiting for a quiz to start...
Waiting for a quiz to start...

fields.name: messages
fields.description: A sequence of messages exchanged during the session.

fields.name: turnCount
fields.description: The number of interactions or turns in the session.

fields.name: lastMessage
fields.description: The text of the most recent message in the session.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used in the session.

fields.name: role
fields.description: The user's function or responsibility within the session.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data associated with a specific item.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when an event occurred.

fields.name: toolName
fields.description: The name of the tool used during the session.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current state or condition of the session.

emits.description: Fired when TutorChat fails to load

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual material presented to the user.

fields.name: category
fields.description: A classification or grouping for the session content.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing a quality or magnitude.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is fixed in position.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: The area or subject covered by the session.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access or usage.

fields.name: input
fields.description: User-provided text or data for processing.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or grouping of the session content.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Represents a numerical measure of certainty or likelihood.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The underlying language model used for the session.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Text content of a message exchange.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification displayed to the user.
fields.synonyms: alert type, message type, notification level

fields.name: topic
fields.description: The subject or area of study being addressed.

fields.name: studentLevel
fields.description: Represents the student's proficiency level.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: Detailed textual clarification or justification.

fields.name: questionsAsked
fields.description: The total number of questions presented during the session.

fields.name: correctAnswers
fields.description: The number of questions answered correctly.

fields.name: sessionStatus
fields.description: Indicates the current state of the session.

fields.name: error
fields.description: A textual description of any encountered problem.

fields.name: activeTab
fields.description: The currently selected tab's identifier.

fields.name: items
fields.description: A collection of tab specifications defining the tab structure.

emits.description: Signals a tab selection has occurred.

events.name: Tab Changed
events.description: Signals a tab selection has occurred.

variant.label: Tab style
variant.description: Visual style of the tab strip

orientation.label: Orientation
orientation.description: Horizontal strip or vertical rail layout

defaultTab.label: Default tab
defaultTab.description: Tab id selected on first render

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered for the tabs surface. Default is the canonical tabs pattern bound to @entity.items / @entity.activeTab. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (segmented-pill bar, vertical sidebar rail, etc.) while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

tabs.label: Tabs
tabs.description: Tab entries with id, label, icon, badge, and optional content trait

fields.name: activeTab
fields.description: The currently selected tab's identifier.

fields.name: items
fields.description: A collection of tab specifications defining the tab structure.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual material presented or displayed.

fields.name: category
fields.description: A classification or grouping for the session content.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing a measure of proficiency.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The item's identifier or title.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the item.

emits.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.
Indicates a failure to load a browse item.
Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.
Signals a request to edit the selected item.
Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

events.name: BrowseItem loaded
events.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.

events.name: BrowseItem load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a browse item.

events.name: Refetch Query
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on the current query.

events.name: Refetch Filter
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on current filter criteria.

events.name: Refetch Page
events.description: Triggers a data grid page refresh.

events.name: View
events.description: Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.

events.name: Edit
events.description: Signals a request to edit the selected item.

events.name: Delete
events.description: Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

badgeBinding.label: Badge field binding
badgeBinding.description: Binding path for the status/badge slot.

descriptionBinding.label: Description field binding
descriptionBinding.description: Binding path for the card body/subtitle slot.

searchPlaceholder.label: Search box placeholder text
searchPlaceholder.description: Hint text inside the list search box (e.g. 'Search orders…').
searchPlaceholder.synonyms: search hint, placeholder, search box text, search label

displayPageSize.label: How many rows to show at once?
displayPageSize.description: Rows visible per page before the pagination control appears.
displayPageSize.synonyms: visible rows, items per page, display limit, show per page

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

fields.label: Which fields should appear as columns?
fields.description: Each entry maps one entity field to a display column with an optional label and variant.
fields.synonyms: visible columns, displayed fields, card fields, column list

imageLabelBinding.label: Image label binding
imageLabelBinding.description: Binding path for the image-area label slot.

itemActions.label: What actions can users take on each row?
itemActions.description: Buttons rendered on each row (e.g. Edit, Delete, View).
itemActions.synonyms: row buttons, row actions, item actions, per-row buttons, table actions

pageSize.label: How many rows to fetch per page?
pageSize.description: Records fetched from the server per page request.
pageSize.synonyms: fetch limit, records per page, batch size, page limit

priceBinding.label: Price field binding
priceBinding.description: Binding path for the price/amount overlay slot.

titleBinding.label: Title field binding
titleBinding.description: Binding path for the card title slot (e.g. @item.dishName).

assigneeBinding.label: Assignee field binding
assigneeBinding.description: Binding path for the assignee/owner slot.

columns.label: Table columns
columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

cols.label: How many columns in the grid?
cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive card/grid layout.
cols.synonyms: columns, grid width, card columns, num columns

gap.label: Spacing between rows
gap.description: Gap between grid cells: sm, md, or lg.
gap.synonyms: row gap, cell spacing, grid gap, padding between items

imageField.label: Which field holds the row image?
imageField.description: Entity field containing the thumbnail URL for each row.
imageField.synonyms: image field, thumbnail field, photo field, picture column

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

filters.label: Which filters should appear above the list?
filters.description: Dropdown filter facets by field. Each fires a refetch when the user changes the selection. Empty = no filter bar.
filters.synonyms: filter bar, faceted filters, field filters, column filters, dropdowns

priorityBinding.label: Priority field binding
priorityBinding.description: Binding path for the priority slot.

maxInlineActions.label: How many row actions to show before collapsing?
maxInlineActions.description: Actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Set 2–3 for dense tables.
maxInlineActions.synonyms: inline actions limit, overflow threshold, max buttons per row

categoryBinding.label: Category field binding
categoryBinding.description: Binding path for the category/tag slot.

metaBinding.label: Meta field binding
metaBinding.description: Binding path for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

fields.description: The item's identifier or title.

fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.
